function.name: edit_repo_file

message.content:
I have changed the rate limiter configuration in src/server.ts as requested:
- The maxRequests was changed from 100 to 50.
- The windowMs was changed from 60000 to 30000.

There are no syntax errors or missing imports introduced by this change. The rate limiter logic and other code remain unchanged. No other files need updating for consistency based on this request.

This completes the requested change.
